case_for: Wilson has cleared 12.0 points in every one of his last six games, including three straight over 15 and a 24.9-point outburst, showing a strong recent floor as a starter.
case_against: His most recent outing dipped to 13.8, only slightly above the threshold, and if efficiency or scoring opportunities regress toward that level a slightly below-average game could dip under 12.
